channel.title: agriculture on Nithin Kamath's personal homepage
channel.description: Recent content in agriculture on Nithin Kamath's personal homepage

item.title: Bee boxes and better farm yields
item.description: Akshayakalpa has 13 years of data showing that simply introducing bee boxes increases the average coconut yield per farm by 20%. It’s such a massive win-win that they’ve now integrated 7,500 bee boxes across all their farms. Shashi from Akshayakalpa recently brought over two bee boxes for my home to get us started with beekeeping. In this clip (full video in comments), he walks through how incredibly simple it is to set up a bee home, even in smaller or semi-urban spaces.
